attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  WI.AR_TRX_KEY,                    
  WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,               
  WI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,    
  WI.GL_DTM,                        
  WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT,
  WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
  WI.DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT,        
  WI.DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT,         
  WI.PRODUCT_KEY,                   
  WI.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
  WI.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD,
  WI.SS_CD,         
  WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,         
  WI.SLS_COMM_PCT,          
  WI.GL_POSTED_DT ,                 
  WI.SERVICE_FLG   ,                
  WI.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,           
  WI.BK_COMPANY_CODE     ,          
  WI.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER       ,
  WI.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
  WI.TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD        ,
  WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
  WI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WI.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     ,
  WI.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            ,
  WI.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE         ,
  WI.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      ,
  WI.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
  WI.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     ,
  WI.COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT           ,
  WI.INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT          ,
  WI.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
  WI.DV_UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
  WI.BK_DEAL_ID                    ,
  WI.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID     ,
  WI.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          ,
  WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
  WI.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
  WI.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
  WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
  WI.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
  WI.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     ,
  WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            ,
  CASE  WHEN    XCAT_FLAG   = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE COALESCE(OFFER.ELA_FLG,'N') END AS ELA_FLG ,
      
    CASE WHEN SO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 
         ELSE CASE WHEN NP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' 
                        ELSE 'N'
                  END
  END  XCAT_FLAG,
  
  COALESCE(OFFER.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N') RECURRING_OFFER_FLG          ,
  COALESCE(OFFER.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others') BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME          ,
  
  CASE WHEN WI.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 THEN WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY 
    ELSE   CASE WHEN WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'STANDALONE' AND SATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY <0  THEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY 
      ELSE   SATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY  END 
   END AS    DV_PRODUCT_KEY_DRVD  
   
  /*Added as part of ICPM DEFREV JUNECDR*/
     
    ,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
   DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY,
     POS_TRX_ID_INT,
     ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD,
    COALESCE(WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,0.0000000) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY18 SOT XAAS*/
  ,
  CAST (
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || 
  TRIM(COALESCE(DV_PRODUCT_KEY_DRVD,-999)) ||  '~' || 
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' || 
  TRIM(COALESCE(SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999))AS VARCHAR(70)) AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
  ,WI.POB_TYPE_CD          
  ,WI.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG 
  ,WI.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY /*Added as part of Accrual Changes*/
 ,WI.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY /*Added as part of MERAKI Changes*/
 ,WI.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY /*Added as part of residuals Q1FY20*/
 ,'='  NET_PRICE_FLG
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_DEFERRED_REVENUE_TRX WI
  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE BV
  ON BV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    = WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE SATIL_PAR
  ON ( CASE WHEN BV.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NULL OR BV.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0
  THEN BV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE BV.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END ) = SATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
  
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP OFFER
  ON  OFFER.PRODUCT_KEY = WI.PRODUCT_KEY    
  AND OFFER.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  = SATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY
  AND OFFER.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD  = WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
  
      INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SO
     ON  SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY
     
        
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON   WI.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY

SELECT 
  WI.AR_TRX_KEY,                    
  WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,               
  WI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,    
  WI.GL_DTM,                        
  WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT,
  WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
  WI.DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT,        
  WI.DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT,         
  WI.PRODUCT_KEY,                   
  WI.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
  WI.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD,
  WI.SS_CD,         
  WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,         
  WI.SLS_COMM_PCT,          
  WI.GL_POSTED_DT ,                 
  WI.SERVICE_FLG   ,                
  WI.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,           
  WI.BK_COMPANY_CODE     ,          
  WI.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER       ,
  WI.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
  WI.TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD        ,
  WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
  WI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WI.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     ,
  WI.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            ,
  WI.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE         ,
  WI.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      ,
  WI.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
  WI.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     ,
  WI.COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT           ,
  WI.INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT          ,
  WI.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
  WI.DV_UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
  WI.BK_DEAL_ID                    ,
  WI.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID     ,
  WI.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          ,
  WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
  WI.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
  WI.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
  WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
  WI.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
  WI.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     ,
  WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            ,
  CASE  WHEN    XCAT_FLAG   = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE Coalesce(OFFER.ELA_FLG,'N') END AS ELA_FLG ,
      
    CASE WHEN SO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 
         ELSE CASE WHEN NP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' 
                        ELSE 'N'
                  END
  END  XCAT_FLAG,
  
  Coalesce(OFFER.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N') RECURRING_OFFER_FLG          ,
  Coalesce(OFFER.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others') BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME          ,
   CASE WHEN WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'STANDALONE' AND SATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY <0  THEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY 
     ELSE   SATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY  END AS    DV_PRODUCT_KEY  
  
  /*Added as part of ICPM DEFREV JUNECDR*/
     
    ,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
   DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY,
     POS_TRX_ID_INT,
     ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD,
    Coalesce(WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,0.0000000) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT, /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY18 SOT XAAS*/
  Cast (
  Trim(Coalesce(WI.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || 
  Trim(Coalesce(DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||  '~' || 
  Trim(Coalesce(WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' || 
  Trim(Coalesce(SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999))AS VARCHAR(70)) AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
  ,WI.POB_TYPE_CD          
  ,WI.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG 
  ,'=' AS NET_PRICE_FLG
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_DEFERRED_REVENUE_TRX_CSPP_VIP WI
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE BV
  ON (BV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    = WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
 AND BV.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0) 
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE SATIL_PAR
  ON ( CASE WHEN BV.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NULL OR BV.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0
  THEN BV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE BV.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END ) = SATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP OFFER
  ON  OFFER.PRODUCT_KEY = WI.PRODUCT_KEY    
  AND OFFER.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  = SATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY
  AND OFFER.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD  = WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SO
 ON  SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON WI.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
  
 UNION ALL
  
 SELECT 
  WI.AR_TRX_KEY,                    
  WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,               
  WI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,    
  WI.GL_DTM,                        
  WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT,
  WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
  WI.DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT,        
  WI.DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT,         
  WI.PRODUCT_KEY,                   
  WI.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
  WI.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD,
  WI.SS_CD,         
  WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,         
  WI.SLS_COMM_PCT,          
  WI.GL_POSTED_DT ,                 
  WI.SERVICE_FLG   ,                
  WI.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,           
  WI.BK_COMPANY_CODE     ,          
  WI.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER       ,
  WI.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
  WI.TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD        ,
  WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
  WI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WI.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     ,
  WI.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            ,
  WI.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE         ,
  WI.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      ,
  WI.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
  WI.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     ,
  WI.COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT           ,
  WI.INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT          ,
  WI.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
  WI.DV_UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
  WI.BK_DEAL_ID                    ,
  WI.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID     ,
  WI.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          ,
  WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
  WI.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
  WI.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
  WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
  WI.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
  WI.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     ,
  WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            ,
  CASE  WHEN    XCAT_FLAG   = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE Coalesce(OFFER.ELA_FLG,'N') END AS ELA_FLG ,
      
    CASE WHEN SO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 
         ELSE CASE WHEN NP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' 
                        ELSE 'N'
                  END
  END  XCAT_FLAG,
  
  Coalesce(OFFER.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N') RECURRING_OFFER_FLG          ,
  Coalesce(OFFER.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others') BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME          ,
   CASE WHEN WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'STANDALONE' AND SATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY <0  THEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY 
     ELSE   SATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY  END AS    DV_PRODUCT_KEY  
  
  /*Added as part of ICPM DEFREV JUNECDR*/
     
    ,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
   DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY,
     POS_TRX_ID_INT,
     ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD,
    Coalesce(WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,0.0000000) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT, /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY18 SOT XAAS*/
  Cast (
  Trim(Coalesce(WI.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || 
  Trim(Coalesce(DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||  '~' || 
  Trim(Coalesce(WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' || 
  Trim(Coalesce(SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999))AS VARCHAR(70)) AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
  ,WI.POB_TYPE_CD          
  ,WI.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG 
  ,'=' AS NET_PRICE_FLG
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_DEFERRED_REVENUE_TRX_CSPP_VIP WI
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE BV
  ON BV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    = WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
   AND (BV.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0  OR BV.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NULL)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE SATIL_PAR
  ON ( CASE WHEN BV.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NULL OR BV.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0
  THEN BV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE BV.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END ) = SATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP OFFER
  ON  OFFER.PRODUCT_KEY = WI.PRODUCT_KEY    
  AND OFFER.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  = SATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY
  AND OFFER.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD  = WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SO
 ON  SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON WI.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
